title: Wave 8 — Demo hardening
goal: Make the Compass MCP Guard MVP reviewable and demoable with a local runbook, redacted audit examples, clear failure guidance, and explicit network readiness boundaries.
scopeDecision: Wave 8 is documentation and verification hardening only. It does not add production custody, mainnet signing, durable audit storage, frontend approval UI, or upstream MCP passthrough.

tasks.title: Create executable local demo runbook
acceptanceCriteria: Runbook can be followed from repo root.
Runbook demonstrates ALLOW, REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL, and DENY outcomes.
Runbook does not require reading or exposing secrets.

tasks.title: Add redacted audit examples
acceptanceCriteria: Examples include candidate ID, decision, risk class, result, reason codes, and metadata status fields.
Examples do not include private keys, raw transaction bytes, full prompts, or secret material.

tasks.title: Document devnet/mainnet readiness
acceptanceCriteria: Docs state local signer demos are controlled non-mainnet demos only.
Docs state mainnet local signer execution is blocked for MVP.
Docs do not claim production custody readiness.

tasks.title: Validate Wave 8 docs and active code
acceptanceCriteria: Captured runbook output matches expected decisions.
evidence: Wave 8 runbook command passed and produced ALLOW, REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL, DENY, and sentinelLeaked=false.
npm run test:back passed: 14 files, 153 tests.
npm run lint passed with one pre-existing app/layout.tsx Fast Refresh warning and 0 errors.
